RUFAS.routines.field.crop package

Submodules

RUFAS.routines.field.crop.biomass_allocation module

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.biomass_allocation.BiomassAllocation(crop_data: CropData | None = None)

Bases: object

allocate_biomass(light)

allocate a plant’s accumulated biomass during the day’s growth

partition_biomass()

partition the accumulated biomass into above ground and below grown portions

photosynthesize(light)

convert the day’s incoming light energy into plant biomass

Args: total available solar radiation for the day (MJ/m^2)

RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop module

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop.Crop(crop_data: CropData | None = None)

Bases: object

biomass_allocation

Process component controlling allocation of plant biomass as a function of growth and photosynthesis

crop_management

Process component controlling calculation of end-of-season production

data

reference to the crop data; tracks all crop variables through the simulation

dormancy

Process component performing dormancy operations

grow_crop(soil_data: SoilData, incoming_light: float, mean_air_temperature: float, min_air_temperature: float, max_air_temperature: float) → None

main function for growing the crop on a daily basis

Args:

soil_data: the SoilData object that tracks soil properties.

incoming_light: incoming light radiation energy (MJ/m)

mean_air_temperature: average air temperature for the day (C) min_air_temperature: minimum air temperature for the day (C) max_air_temperature: maximum air temperature for the day (C)

Details: grow_crop is a wrapper function for all the Crop growth

process sub-routines. It should be called every day that the crop is alive and growing in the simulation

growth_constraints

Process component controlling growth constraints, limits plant growth as a function of stressors

heat_units

Process component controlling plant heat accumulation

leaf_area_index

Process component controlling canopy growth, including leaf area index

nitrogen_incorporation

Process component controlling plant nitrogen incorporation, including uptake and fixation

phosphorus_incorporation

Process component controlling plant phosphorus uptake and incorporation

root_development

Process component controlling plant root development

water_dynamics

Process component controlling plant water dynamics

water_uptake

Process component controlling water uptake from soil

RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_data module

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for alfalfa

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0417

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0035

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.029

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0028

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = True

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 20.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.02

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.002

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 3000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 4.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default alfalfa'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 25.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'perennial_legume'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'ALFA'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Medicago sativa'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'alfalfa'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.025

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0035

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for cereal rye

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.06

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0084

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0231

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0032

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 35.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.013

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 1800

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.2

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default cereal_rye'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.4

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 12.5

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'RYE'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

taxonomic name of the plant

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.8

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for corn

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.047

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0048

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0177

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0018

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 39.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0138

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0014

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 3.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.3

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 8.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default corn'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.5

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 25.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'warm_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'CORN'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Zea mays'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'corn'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.014

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0016

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_data.CornSilage(*, species: str = 'corn_silage', name: str = 'default corn_silage', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str = 'CSIL', scientific_name: str = 'Zea mays', plant_category: PlantCategory = PlantCategory.WARM_ANNUAL, is_perennial: bool | None = False, is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False, priority: int = 1, field_proportion: float = 1.0, is_alive: bool = = 100, phosphorus: float = 20, optimal_phosphorus: float = 80, water_stress: float | None = None, temp_stress: float | None = None, nitrogen_stress: float | None = None, phosphorus_stress: float | user_harvest_index: float | None = None, potential_harvest_index: float | None = None, harvest_index: float | None = None, cut_biomass: float | None = None, yield_collected: float | None = None, dormancy_loss_fraction: float | None = None, minimum_lai_during_dormancy: float | None = 0.75)

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for corn silage

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.047

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0048

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0177

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0018

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 39.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0138

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0014

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 8.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default corn_silage'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 25.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'warm_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'CSIL'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Zea mays'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'corn_silage'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.014

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0016

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_data.CropData(*, species: str | None = 'generic', name: str | None = 'default generic annual crop', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str | None = None, scientific_name: str | None = None, plant_category: PlantCategory | None = PlantCategory.COOL_ANNUAL, is_perennial: bool | None = False, is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False, priority: int = 1, field_proportion: float = 1.0, is_alive: bool = True, planting_year: int = 0, planting_day: int = 100, next_harvest_year: int = 0, next_harvest_day: int = 250, use_heat_scheduling: bool = False, harvest_heat_fraction: float = 1.1, is_harvest_day: bool = False, next_harvest_operation: HarvestOperation = HarvestOperation.HARVEST, minimum_temperature: float = 0, optimal_temperature: float = 25, residue_phosphorus: float | None = None, dormancy_loss_fraction: float | None = None, minimum_lai_during_dormancy: float | None = 0.75)

Bases: object

Data class containing crop variables.

Details:

The kw_only=True argument of the @dataclass decorator specifies that this class’ attributes can only be initialized with values other than defaults by explicitly including the keyword (i.e, positional arguments are disabled). For example CropData() will initialize with the default light_extinction value (0.65), CropData(light_extinction=0.7) will initialize with the vallue set to 0.7, but CropData(0.65) will not work. The upside is that this facilitates dataclass inheritance. For example, the CornData class inherits from CropData but will have its values set to different defaults.

This “Generic” crop uses the values for Grain Sorghum.

above_ground_biomass: float = 0.1

biomass stored in the above ground portion of the plant; plant biomass excluding roots (kg/ha)

accessible_depths: List[float] | None = None

slice of soil layer boundaries to which the plant has access (mm)

accessible_soil_layers: int | None = None

number of layers in the soil profile that the plant roots have access to (unitless)

accumulated_heat_units: float = 0

total heat units accumulated to date (unitless)

actual_nitrogen_uptakes: List[float] | None = None

actual nitrogen to be taken up by the plant from each soil layer (kg/ha)

actual_phosphorus_uptakes: List[float] | None = None

actual phosphorus to be taken up by the plant from each soil layer (kg/ha)

actual_water_uptakes: List[float] | None = None

the actual amount of water to be removed from the soil

biomass: float = 0

total plant biomass (kg/ha)

biomass_growth: float | None = None

biomass accumulated by the plant during the day (kg/ha)

biomass_growth_max: float | None = None

upper-limit of biomass accumulation for the day (kg/ha)

canopy_height: float | None = None

current height of the plant (m)

canopy_water: float = 0

Amount of water currently held in the canopy (mm)

cumulative_evaporation: float = 0.0

total water lost to evaporation by the plant during the growing season (mm)

cumulative_evapotranspiration: float = 0.0

total water lost to evapotranspiration by the plant during the growing season (mm)

cumulative_potential_evapotranspiration: float = 0.0

total expected maximum water loss by the plant during the growing season (mm)

cumulative_transpiration: float = 0.0

total water lost to transpiration by the plant during the growing season (mm)

cut_biomass: float | None = None

total amount of the desired crop product (kg/ha)

property do_harvest_index_override: bool

was a user-defined harvest index is given? This triggers a harvest index override

dormancy_loss_fraction: float | None = None

Fraction of biomass the crop loses when it goes dormant. Default 0.1 for perennials, 0.3 for trees Reference: SWAT Theoretical 5:1.2, and crop.dat BIO_LEAF description

dry_down_fraction: float = 0.2

proportion of plant biomass that is lost to dry-down (unitless; [0, 1])

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.05

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.005

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

evapotranspiration_weighting_coefficient: float = 1

plant evapotranspiration curve number coefficient (unitless), in the range 0.5 to 2.0 inclusive(?). Used in SWAT equation 2:1.1.9, definition in .bsn input data description (named CNCOEF there)

field_proportion: float = 1.0

the proportion of the field that this crop occupies. Should be 1 when this is the only crop in the field

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

fixation_stage_factor: float | None = None

growth stage factor of the nitrogen fixing symbiotes for the current plant growth stage (unitless)

fixed_nitrogen: float | None = None

total amount of nitrogen fixed by the plant (kg/ha)

growth_factor: float = 1.0

growth factor multiplier for the plant (unitless; [0, 1])

half_mature_heat_fraction: float = 0.5

expected fraction of potential heat units when the plant is half-way to maturity (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.02

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.003

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

harvest_efficiency: float = 1.0

efficiency of the harvest operation: the proportion of yield that will be extracted from the field (unitless; [0, 1])

harvest_heat_fraction: float = 1.1

the fraction of potential heat units that denotes the optimal growth stage for harvest

harvest_index: float | None = None

harvest index for a given day; fraction of above-ground plant biomass that is harvestable economic yield (unitless)

property heat_fraction: float

Fraction of potential heat units accumulated.

References

SWAT Theoretical documentation section 5:2.1.4

heat_unit_temperature: float | None = None

heat unit temperature used by alternative heat unit method (Celsius)

id: Any | None = None

the unique identifier for this crop instance

property in_growing_season: bool

Indicates if the plant is in its growing season.

inaccessible_soil_layers: int | None = None

number of layers in the soil profile that the plant roots do not have access to (unitless)

is_alive: bool = True

is the crop currently alive in the field?

is_dormant: bool = False

is the crop currently dormant?

is_growing: bool = True

is the crop currently growing?

is_harvest_day: bool = False

Status indicating if today is the day on which harvest operations should occur for this plant

property is_in_senescence: bool

check if the plant is in senescence

property is_mature: bool

Checks if maturity has been reached based on the fraction of potential heat units accumulated.

References

SWAT Theoretical documentation section 5:2.1.4

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

is_perennial: bool | None = False

is this plant perennial?

layer_nitrogen_potentials: float | None = None

potential nitrogen uptake from each soil layer (kg/ha)

leaf_area_added: float | None = None

leaf area index change during the day; corrected for growth constraints (unitless)

leaf_area_index: float = 0.0

leaf area index of the plant (unitless)

light_extinction: float = 0.65

the light extinction coefficient (unitless)

light_use_efficiency: float = 30

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_heat_fraction: float = 1.0

fraction of potential heat units accumulated for the plant to date (unitless)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.01

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.002

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_canopy_height: float = 2.5

maximum canopy height for the plant (m)

max_canopy_water_capacity: float = 0.8

Maximum amount of water that can be trapped in canopy on a given day when fully developed (mm). References: SWAT Theoretical documentation eqn. 2:2.1.1 (see also SWAT Input file .HRU (“CANMX” page 233). Note: this default is super arbitrary. It comes from the paper:

‘Holder AJ, Rowe R, McNamara NP, Donnison IS, McCalmont JP. Soil & Water Assessment Tool (SWAT) simulated hydrological impacts of land use change from temperate grassland to energy crops: A case study in western UK. GCB Bioenergy. 2019;11:1298–1317. https ://doi.org/10.1111/gcbb.12628’

which cites the following paper that I could not find:
‘Wang, D., Li, J. S., & Rao, M. J. (2006). Winter wheat canopy interception under sprinkler irrigation.

Scientia Agricultura Sinica, 39(9), 1859–1864.’

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

max_transpiration: float | None = None

maximum transpiration on a given day (mm)

maximum_heat_unit_temperature: float | None = None

maximum temperature used for heat unit calculations during the alternative heat unit method (Celsius)

maximum_temperature: float = 38

maximum temperature above which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.2

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_cover_management_factor: float = 0.2

minimum value for cover and management factor for water erosion applicable to land cover/plant (unitless) (SWAT Reference: 4:1.1.11)

minimum_heat_unit_temperature: float | None = None

minimum temperature used for heat unit calculations during the alternative heat unit method (Celsius)

minimum_lai_during_dormancy: float | None = 0.75

Minimum leaf area index for plants (perennials and trees only) during dormancy (unitless)

Note: SWAT Appendix-A section A.1.12 says that the default 0.75 is from pre-2009 versions of SWAT and users are now allowed to modify this value. But it does not provide values for any of the listed plant species and gives no information about how this value can be measured or calculated.

minimum_temperature: float = 0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str | None = 'default generic annual crop'

the name of this specific crop instance

near_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.02

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at near-maturity (unitless)

near_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.3

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant near maturity (unitless)

new_heat_units: float | None = None

heat units accumulated on the current day; degrees C above minimum growth temperature (Celsius*)

next_harvest_day: int = 250

the (julian) day on which this crop should be harvested next

next_harvest_operation: HarvestOperation = 'default'

the specific harvest operation to be executed next for this plant

next_harvest_year: int = 0

the year in which this crop should be harvested next

nitrate_factor: float | None = None

soil nitrate factor (unitless; [0, 1])

nitrogen: float = 35

nitrogen stored in plant biomass (kg/ha)

nitrogen_distro_param: float = 10

nitrogen uptake distribution parameter (unitless)

nitrogen_requests: float | None = None

amount of nitrogen requested from each soil layer by the plant (kg/ha)

nitrogen_shapes: List[float] | None = None

first and second shape coefficients for the nitrogen uptake equations (unitless)

nitrogen_stress: float | None = None

nitrogen stress for the day (unitless; [0, 1])

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.5

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_leaf_area_change: float | None = None

leaf area index added under ideal conditions for the day; not corrected for growth constraints (unitless)

optimal_leaf_area_fraction: float | None = None

fraction of the plant’s maximum leaf area index corresponding to the current heat fraction (unitless)

optimal_nitrogen: float = 100

optimal amount of nitrogen stored in the plant for the current growth stage (kg/ha)

optimal_nitrogen_fraction: float | None = None

optimal proportion of the plant’s biomass comprised of nitrogen for the current growth stage (unitless)

optimal_phosphorus: float = 80

optimal amount of phosphorus stored in the plant for the current growth stage (kg/ha)

optimal_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.073

optimal proportion of the plant’s biomass comprised of nitrogen for the current growth stage (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 25

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

phosphorus: float = 20

phosphorus stored in plant biomass (kg/ha)

phosphorus_distro_param: float = 10

phosphorus uptake distribution parameter (unitless)

phosphorus_shapes: List[float] | None = None

first and second shape coefficients for the nitrogen uptake equations (unitless)

phosphorus_stress: float | None = None

phosphorus stress for the day (unitless; [0, 1])

plant_category: PlantCategory | None = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str | None = None

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

planting_day: int = 100

the (julian) day that this crop was planted

planting_year: int = 0

the year that this crop was planted

potential_harvest_index: float | None = None

potential harvest index for a given day (unitless)

potential_heat_units: float = 800

total heat units required for the plant to reach maturity (unitless)

potential_nitrogen_uptake: float | None = None

potential nitrogen to be taken up by the plant under ideal circumstances for the current day (kg/ha)

potential_phosphorus_uptake: float | None = None

potential phosphorus to be taken up by the plant under ideal circumstances for the current day (kg/ha)

potential_water_uptakes: List[float] | None = None

the maximum amount of water to be potentially taken up by a crop, from each soil layer (mm)

previous_biomass: float | None = None

biomass accumulated by the plant on the previous day (kg/ha)

previous_leaf_area_index: float | None = None

leaf area index on the previous day (unitless)

previous_nitrogen: float | None = None

nitrogen stored in plant biomass on the previous day (kg/ha)

previous_optimal_leaf_area_fraction: float | None = None

optimal leaf area fraction on the previous day (unitless)

previous_phosphorus: float | None = None

phosphorus value on the previous day (kg/ha)

priority: int = 1

this crop’s priority level when accessing shared resources in a field containing multiple crops

residue_nitrogen: float | None = None

amount of nitrogen in the residue from this plant (kg/ha)

residue_phosphorus: float | None = None

amount of phosphorus in the residue from this plant (kg/ha)

root_biomass: float | None = 0.0

biomass stored in roots (kg/ha)

root_depth: float = 1

current depth of the plant roots in the soil (mm)

root_fraction: float = 0.3333333333333333

proportion of plant biomass that is stored below ground in roots (unitless)

scientific_name: str | None = None

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str | None = 'generic'

the species of the crop

temp_stress: float | None = None

temperature stress for the day (unitless; [0, 1])

total_nitrogen_uptake: float | None = None

total nitrogen to be taken up by the plant (kg/ha)

total_phosphorus_uptake: float | None = None

total amount of phosphorus taken up by the plant

total_soil_layers: int | None = None

total number of layers in the soil profile (unitless)

total_water_uptake: float = 0.0

Total amount of water the plant took from the soil on the current day (mm)

unmet_nitrogen_demands: float | None = None

plant nitrogen demands that remain unmet by the overlaying soil layers (kg/ha)

unmet_water_demands: List[float] | None = None

cumulative water demands not met by all previous layers

usable_light: float | None = None

solar radiation captured for photosynthesis during the day (MJ/m^2)

use_heat_scheduling: bool = False

Status indicating if heat unit scheduling will be used to determine harvesting instead of user-specified harvest dates

use_heat_unit_temperature: bool = False

should the alternative heat unit method be used? Determines if heat unit temperature will be used for heat unit accumulation.

user_harvest_index: float | None = None

a user-specified harvest index (unitless). If given, ‘harvest-index-override’ is triggered

property water_canopy_storage_capacity: float

Maximum amount of water that can be held in the canopy (mm).

References

SWAT Theoretical documentation eqn. 2:2.1.1

water_compensation_factor: float = 0.01

factor that determines the ability of a plant to draw water from deeper layers when demands are not met (unitless). 0 indicates no water can be drawn from deeper than expected and 1 indicates that any and all water can be drawn from deeper layers.

water_deficiency: float | None = None

water deficiency factor for the plant (unitless)

water_distro_parameter: float = 10

water-use distribution parameter governing water-uptake from the soil. Defaults to 10 for all crops in SWAT (unitless).

water_stress: float | None = None

water stress for the day (unitless; [0, 1])

water_uptake: float = 18

water taken up by the plant for the day (mm)

yield_collected: float | None = None

amount of the desired crop product to be removed from the field (kg/ha)

yield_nitrogen: float | None = None

nitrogen contained in the harvested yield (kg/ha)

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float | None = 0.2

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus: float | None = None

phosphorus contained in the harvested yield (kg/ha)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float | None = 0.003

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

yield_residue: float | None = None

amount of residue created; unharvested yield (kg/ha)

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_data.FallOats(*, species: str = 'fall_oats', name: str = 'default fall_oats', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str = 'OATS', scientific_name: str = 'Avena sativa', plant_category: PlantCategory = PlantCategory.COOL_ANNUAL, is_perennial: bool | None = False, is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False, priority: int = 1, field_proportion: float = 1.0, is_alive: bool Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for fall oats

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.06

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0084

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.02

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0231

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0032

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 35.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0134

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.175

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 0.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default fall_oats'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.42

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 15.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'OATS'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Avena sativa'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'fall_oats'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0316

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0057

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_data.PlantCategory(value)

Bases: Enum

Enum of all plant types supported by RuFaS. Listed for supported plant types in SWAT Appendix A, table A-1

COOL_ANNUAL = 'cool_annual'
COOL_ANNUAL_LEGUME = 'cool_annual_legume'
PERENNIAL = 'perennial'
PERENNIAL_LEGUME = 'perennial_legume'
TREE = 'tree'
WARM_ANNUAL = 'warm_annual'
WARM_ANNUAL_LEGUME = 'warm_annual_legume'

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for potato

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.055

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.006

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.02

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0025

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 25.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.012

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 600

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.95

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 7.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default potato'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.95

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 22.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'POTA'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Solanum tuberosum'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'potato'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0246

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0023

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_data.Soybean(*, species: str = 'soybean', name: str = 'default soybean', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str = 'SOYB', scientific_name: str = 'Glycine max', plant_category: PlantCategory = PlantCategory.WARM_ANNUAL_LEGUME, is_perennial: bool | None = False, is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = True, priority: int = 1, field_proportion: float = 1.0, is_alive: bool = True, planting_year: int = 0, planting_day: int = 100, next_harvest_year: int = 0, next_harvest_day: int = 250, use_heat_scheduling: bool = False, harvest_heat_fraction: float = 1.1, is_harvest_day: bool = False, next_harvest_operation: HarvestOperation = HarvestOperation.HARVEST, minimum_temperature: float = 10.0, optimal_temperature: float = 25.0, max_leaf_area_index: float = 3.0, first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15, first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05, second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5, second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95, senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9, light_use_efficiency: float = 25.0, minimum_cover_management_factor: float = 0.2, emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0524, half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0265, Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for soy bean

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0524

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0074

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0265

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0037

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = True

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 25.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0258

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0035

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 3.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 1700

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.01

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 10.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default soybean'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.31

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 25.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'warm_annual_legume'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'SOYB'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Glycine max'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'soybean'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.065

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0091

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for spring barley

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.059

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0057

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0226

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0022

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 35.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0131

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0013

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 1300

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.2

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 0.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default spring_barley'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.54

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 25.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'BARL'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Hordeum vulgare'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.45

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'spring_barley'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.021

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0017

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

crop data class with default values for spring wheat

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.06

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0084

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0032

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 35.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.2

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 0.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default spring_wheat'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.42

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 18.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'SWHT'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Triticum aestivum'

taxonomic name of the plant

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

class RUFAS.routines.field.crop.crop_data.SugarBeet(*, species: str = 'sugar_beet', name: str = 'default sugar_beet', id: Any | None = None, plant_code: str = 'SGBT', scientific_name: str = 'Beta 5.0, first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.05, first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05, second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5, second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95, senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9, light_use_efficiency: float = 30.0, minimum_cover_management_factor: float = 0.2, emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.055, half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.02, mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.012, emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.006, half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0025, mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019, yield_residue: float | None = None, yield_nitrogen: float | None = None, yield_phosphorus: float | None = None, residue_nitrogen: float | None = None, residue_phosphorus: float | None = None, dormancy_loss_fraction: float | None = None, minimum_lai_during_dormancy: float | None = 0.75)

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for sugar beet

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.055

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.006

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.05

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.02

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0025

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 30.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.012

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 5.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 1.1

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 4.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default sugar_beet'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 2.0

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 18.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'warm_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'SGBT'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Beta vulgaris saccharifera'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'sugar_beet'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.013

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.002

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for tall fescue

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.056

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0099

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.021

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0022

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 30.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.012

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 0.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default tall_fescue'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.9

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 15.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'perennial'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'FESC'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Festuca arundinaceae'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.8

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'tall_fescue'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0234

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0033

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)

Bases: CropData

crop data class with default values for triticale Notes ——- We use the closest analog data available which is the Durum Wheat data

emergence_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.06

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at emergence (unitless)

emergence_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0084

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at emergence (unitless)

first_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.15

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

first_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.01

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the first point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

half_mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0231

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

half_mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0032

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at half-maturity (unitless)

is_nitrogen_fixer: bool = False

is the plant a nitrogen fixer?

light_use_efficiency: float = 30.0

light use efficiency of the plant (dg/MJ)

mature_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.013

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of nitrogen for the plant at maturity (unitless)

mature_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0019

expected fraction of plant biomass comprised of phosphorus for the plant at maturity (unitless)

max_leaf_area_index: float = 4.0

maximum leaf area index for the plant (unitless)

max_root_depth: float = 2000

maximum depth of roots in the soil (mm)

min_harvest_index: float = 0.2

expected species-specific harvest index for the plant under drought conditions; represents minimum harvest index allowed for the plant (unitless)

minimum_temperature: float = 0.0

minimum temperature below which plant growth cannot occur (Celsius)

name: str = 'default triticale'

the name of this specific crop instance

optimal_harvest_index: float = 0.4

expected species-specific optimal harvest index for the plant at maturity under ideal growth conditions (unitless)

optimal_temperature: float = 15.0

ideal temperature for maximum plant growth (Celsius)

plant_category: PlantCategory = 'cool_annual'

Classification of the plant (Reference SWAT crop.dat file, IDC variable

plant_code: str = 'DWHT'

4-letter plant code (used by SWAT)

scientific_name: str = 'Triticum durum'

taxonomic name of the plant

second_heat_fraction_point: float = 0.5

fraction of the growing season corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

second_leaf_fraction_point: float = 0.95

fraction of max leaf area index corresponding to the second point on the optimal leaf development curve (unitless)

senescent_heat_fraction: float = 0.9

the fraction of potential heat units above which the plant goes enters senescence (unitless)

species: str = 'triticale'

the species of the crop

yield_nitrogen_fraction: float = 0.0263

crop-specific expected fraction of nitrogen in yield (unitless)

yield_phosphorus_fraction: float = 0.0057

crop-specific expected fraction of phosphorus in yield (unitless)
